title: 02.27.26 Weekly Reports Public Records Request, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Services Requests
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: February 27, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Esha Singh, Management Assistant
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: Weekly Reports: Public Records Request, Media Requests, and Code
Enforcement Services Requests
This memorandum includes weekly reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic
Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for February 20, 2026
through February 26, 2026.
The following reports are attached:
• Public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office (attachment A)
• Weekly media requests received by Communications (attachment B)
• Weekly code enforcement service requests received by Code Enforcement (attachment C)

fields.tldr: This memo transmits weekly reports to the Mayor and City Council covering the period of February 20–26, 2026. The reports include public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office, media requests handled by Strategic Communications, and code enforcement service requests. The attached logs detail dozens of individual requests spanning police records, fire prevention records, building permits, 911 dispatch logs, and other general public records categories.
fields.key_stats: The visible portion of the public records log (pages 1–2 of 13) shows at least 57 requests logged between February 20–22, 2026, spanning Police Department Records, General Public Records, and Fire Department Records categories. The most common request types include Police Reports, Body Worn Camera Video, Building Plans/Permits/Inspections, and 911/Dispatch Calls.
fields.action_items: No action items required of the Mayor or City Council; memo is informational only. Attached reports (Attachments A, B, and C) are provided for awareness.
